message:
feat(twilio): add Programmable Video API operations (6 operations)

Add video room management (create, get, list, end), participant
listing, and recording listing via video.twilio.com/v1 API. Includes
dedicated rate limit pool, network constraints, and golden vector
updates. Total: 35 Twilio operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     "operational",

@@ -2027,6 +2027,320 @@ common_mistakes = ["Can only cancel pending verifications, not already-checked o

+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Operations: Video API
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create"]
+description = "Create a video room"
+capability = "twilio.video.rooms.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".input_schema.properties.unique_name]
+type = "string"
+description = "Unique name for the room"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".input_schema.properties.room_type]
+type = "string"
+description = "Room type: group, peer-to-peer, group-small, go"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".input_schema.properties.max_participants]
+type = "integer"
+description = "Maximum number of participants"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".output_schema.properties.sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".output_schema.properties.unique_name]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".output_schema.properties.status]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".output_schema.properties.max_participants]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".output_schema.properties.date_created]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["video.twilio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.create".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Create a new Twilio Video room for real-time video/audio communication."
+common_mistakes = ["Not specifying a unique_name makes it harder to reference the room later."]
+examples = ['{"unique_name": "daily-standup", "room_type": "group", "max_participants": 10}']
+related = ["twilio.video.room.get", "twilio.video.room.list", "twilio.video.room.end"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get"]
+description = "Get a video room by SID or unique name"
+capability = "twilio.video.rooms.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".input_schema]
+type = "object"

+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".input_schema.properties.room_sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Room SID or unique name"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".output_schema.properties.sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".output_schema.properties.unique_name]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".output_schema.properties.status]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".output_schema.properties.duration]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".output_schema.properties.date_created]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".output_schema.properties.end_time]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["video.twilio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.get".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Retrieve details of a specific video room by its SID or unique name."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"room_sid": "RMxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"}']
+related = ["twilio.video.room.list", "twilio.video.room.participants"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list"]

+capability = "twilio.video.rooms.read"

+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".rate_limit]

+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".input_schema.properties.status]
+type = "string"
+description = "Filter by status: in-progress, completed"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".input_schema.properties.page_size]
+type = "integer"
+description = "Results per page"

+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".output_schema.properties.rooms]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".output_schema.properties.meta]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".network_constraints]

+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true

+connect_timeout_ms = 10000

+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List video rooms, optionally filtered by status."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"status": "in-progress", "page_size": 20}']
+related = ["twilio.video.room.get", "twilio.video.room.create"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end"]
+description = "End/complete a video room"
+capability = "twilio.video.rooms.write"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".input_schema]
+type = "object"
+required = ["room_sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".input_schema.properties.room_sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Room SID to end"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".output_schema]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".output_schema.properties.sid]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".output_schema.properties.status]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".output_schema.properties.end_time]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["video.twilio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.end".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "End an active video room. This disconnects all participants immediately."
+common_mistakes = ["Cannot end a room that is already completed."]
+examples = ['{"room_sid": "RMxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"}']
+related = ["twilio.video.room.get", "twilio.video.room.participants"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.participants"]
+description = "List participants in a video room"
+capability = "twilio.video.participants.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.participants".rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.participants".input_schema]

+required = ["room_sid"]
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.participants".input_schema.properties.room_sid]
+type = "string"
+description = "Room SID"
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.participants".input_schema.properties.status]
+type = "string"
+description = "Filter by status: connected, disconnected"

+[provides.operations."twilio.video.room.participants".output_schema]

+[provides.operations."twilio.video.recording.list"]
+description = "List recordings for a video room"

+[provides.operations."twilio.video.recording.list".rate_limit]

+[provides.operations."twilio.video.recording.list".input_schema.properties.room_sid]

+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."twilio.video.recording.list".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "List video recordings for a specific room."

+examples = ['{"room_sid": "RMxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"}']
+related = ["twilio.video.room.get"]
+
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 # Streaming / Event Capabilities
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -2105,6 +2419,14 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 5
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "twilio.video"
+description = "Video API operations"
+requests = 100
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 20
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "twilio.send_message" = ["twilio.message"]
 "twilio.get_message" = ["twilio.read"]
@@ -2135,3 +2457,9 @@ scope = "instance"
 "twilio.verify.send" = ["twilio.verify"]
 "twilio.verify.check" = ["twilio.verify"]
 "twilio.verify.cancel" = ["twilio.verify"]
+"twilio.video.room.create" = ["twilio.video"]
+"twilio.video.room.get" = ["twilio.video"]
+"twilio.video.room.list" = ["twilio.video"]
+"twilio.video.room.end" = ["twilio.video"]
+"twilio.video.room.participants" = ["twilio.video"]
+"twilio.video.recording.list" = ["twilio.video"]

@@ -276,6 +276,81 @@ pub struct ApiErrorResponse {
     pub more_info: Option<String>,
 }
 
+// ── Video API types ──────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+/// Twilio Video room.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct TwilioVideoRoom {
+    pub sid: String,
+    pub unique_name: Option<String>,
+    #[serde(rename = "type")]
+    pub room_type: Option<String>,
+    pub status: Option<String>,
+    pub max_participants: Option<u32>,
+    pub max_participant_duration: Option<u32>,
+    pub duration: Option<u32>,
+    pub date_created: Option<String>,
+    pub date_updated: Option<String>,
+    pub end_time: Option<String>,
+    pub url: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// Twilio Video room list response.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct VideoRoomListResponse {
+    pub rooms: Vec<serde_json::Value>,
+    pub meta: Option<VideoMeta>,
+}
+
+/// Twilio Video participant.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct TwilioVideoParticipant {
+    pub sid: String,
+    pub room_sid: Option<String>,
+    pub identity: Option<String>,
+    pub status: Option<String>,
+    pub duration: Option<u32>,
+    pub date_created: Option<String>,
+    pub date_updated: Option<String>,
+    pub url: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// Twilio Video participant list response.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct VideoParticipantListResponse {
+    pub participants: Vec<serde_json::Value>,
+    pub meta: Option<VideoMeta>,
+}
+
+/// Twilio Video recording.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct TwilioVideoRecording {
+    pub sid: String,
+    pub room_sid: Option<String>,
+    pub status: Option<String>,
+    pub duration: Option<u32>,
+    #[serde(rename = "type")]
+    pub recording_type: Option<String>,
+    pub date_created: Option<String>,
+    pub url: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// Twilio Video recording list response.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct VideoRecordingListResponse {
+    pub recordings: Vec<serde_json::Value>,
+    pub meta: Option<VideoMeta>,
+}
+
+/// Video API pagination meta.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct VideoMeta {
+    pub page: Option<u32>,
+    pub page_size: Option<u32>,
+    pub next_page_url: Option<String>,
+    pub previous_page_url: Option<String>,
+}
+
 #[cfg(test)]
 mod tests {
     use super::*;
